parameters.name: From
parameters.description: Email address of sender like sender@domain.com

parameters.name: To
parameters.description: Specify email addresses separated by semicolons like recipient1@domain.com;recipient2@domain.com

parameters.name: CC
parameters.description: Specify email addresses separated by semicolons like recipient1@domain.com;recipient2@domain.com

parameters.name: Subject
parameters.description: Email subject

parameters.name: Body
parameters.description: Email body

parameters.name: Is HTML
parameters.description: Send the email as HTML (true/false)

parameters.name: Bcc
parameters.description: Specify email addresses separated by semicolons like recipient1@domain.com;recipient2@domain.com.

parameters.name: Importance
parameters.description: Importance of the email (High, Normal, or Low)

parameters.name: Read Receipt
parameters.description: Specify email address for Read receipt

parameters.name: Delivery Receipt
parameters.description: Specify email address for Delivery receipt

parameters.name: File name
parameters.description: File name

parameters.name: Content id
parameters.description: Content id

parameters.name: Content data
parameters.description: Content data (base64 encoded for streams and as-is for string)

parameters.name: Content type
parameters.description: Content type

parameters.name: Content Transfer Encoding
parameters.description: Content Transfer Encoding (base64 or none)
